title: Perform process monitoring for Meat Hygiene Assessment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform process monitoring for Meat Hygiene Assessment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive work instructions and clarify where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive work instructions and clarify where required.

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and food safety hazards, and control associated risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards, and control associated risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards, and control associated risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and clothing, and ensure correct fit.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify process monitoring plan.

elements.title: Monitor process

pcs.text: Monitor process according to workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results accurately on appropriate process monitoring sheets or electronic system.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Rate process according to established criteria of acceptable, marginal or unacceptable.

pcs.text: Identify processing defects and implement immediate corrective action according to MHA program's requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify processing defects and implement immediate corrective action according to MHA program's requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and record conformity index after each process monitoring exercise.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor process according to workplace requirements for hygiene and sanitation, and workplace health and safety.
